attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

**1. Objects and Their Types:**

- **Receptacles:**

  - **Fridge**: A dark-colored refrigerator with a visible handle and a yellow smiley face magnet on its door. It is a receptacle and is openable.

- **Objects (non-receptacles):**

  - **Pan**: A black frying pan with a handle. It is placed on the countertop in multiple images, sometimes next to a green cutting board and other kitchen items.
  - **Potato**: A brown, unpeeled potato is visible on the countertop in the third and fifth images, next to a loaf of bread and a green vegetable. It is not sliced or cooked in the initial state.
  - **Bread**: A loaf of brown bread is visible on the countertop in images 2, 3, and 5. It is not relevant to the current instruction.
  - **Cup**: A black cup is on the countertop in images 2 and 5.
  - **Fork**: A metallic fork is lying next to the black cup in images 2 and 5.
  - **Spoon**: A metallic spoon is visible near the cup in images 2 and 5.
  - **Cutting Board**: A green cutting board is on the countertop in images 2, 3, and 5.
  - **Tomato**: A red tomato is inside the trash can in the first image.
  - **Vegetable**: A green, leafy vegetable (possibly lettuce or cabbage) is on the countertop in images 2, 3, and 5.

---

**2. Quantities of Each Object Type:**

- **Pans**: 1
- **Potatoes**: 1 (uncooked, unsliced)
- **Cups**: 1
- **Forks**: 1

---

**3. Spatial Relationships (Matching Domain Predicates):**

- **inReceptacle**:

  - No other objects are currently in any receptacle.

- **atLocation**:

- **Knife**: On the countertop, not held, not used for slicing yet.
- **Potato**: On the countertop, whole, uncooked, unsliced.

- **Fridge**: Dark brown or black, with a yellow smiley face magnet on the door. Located against the wall.
- **Trash Can**: Light gray, rectangular, with a red tomato inside. Positioned on the floor next to the countertop.

- **Potato**: Brown, oval-shaped, unpeeled. Located on the countertop next to the bread.

```pddl
(define (problem put_task_problem)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        microwave fridge trash_can - receptacle
        knife pan potato - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Locations
        (atLocation robot microwave)
        (atLocation knife countertop)
        (atLocation pan countertop)
        (atLocation potato countertop)
        (atLocation microwave countertop)
        (atLocation fridge wall)
        (atLocation trash_can floor)

        ; Receptacle properties
        (openable microwave)
        (openable fridge)
        (openable trash_can)
        (opened trash_can) ; trash can is open as tomato is visible inside

        ; Object states
        (not (isSliced potato))
        (not (isHot potato))
        (not (isCool potato))
        (not (isClean potato))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (isToggled microwave))

        ; Contents
        (inReceptacle tomato trash_can)
    )
    (:goal
        (and
            (inReceptacle pan fridge)
            (inReceptacle knife pan)
            (inReceptacle potato pan)
            (isSliced potato)
            (isHot potato)
        )
    )
)
```
attempts.problem:
(define (problem put_task_problem)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        microwave fridge trash_can - receptacle
        knife pan potato - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Locations
        (atLocation robot microwave)
        (atLocation knife countertop)
        (atLocation pan countertop)
        (atLocation potato countertop)
        (atLocation microwave countertop)
        (atLocation fridge wall)
        (atLocation trash_can floor)

        ; Receptacle properties
        (openable microwave)
        (openable fridge)
        (openable trash_can)
        (opened trash_can) ; trash can is open as tomato is visible inside

        ; Object states
        (not (isSliced potato))
        (not (isHot potato))
        (not (isCool potato))
        (not (isClean potato))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (isToggled microwave))

        ; Contents
        (inReceptacle tomato trash_can)
    )
    (:goal
        (and
            (inReceptacle pan fridge)
            (inReceptacle knife pan)
            (inReceptacle potato pan)
            (isSliced potato)
            (isHot potato)
        )
    )
)

SCENE CAPTION:

**Receptacles:**
- **Microwave**: A silver microwave oven sits on a brown marble countertop. Its digital display reads "OFF". It is a receptacle and is currently closed and not openable in the current state (no indication it is openable or opened). It is not currently holding any object inside.
- **Fridge**: A black refrigerator with a textured surface is visible. It has a yellow smiley face magnet and a photo attached to its door. It is a receptacle and is currently closed. It is not openable or opened in the current state.
- **Sink**: Not visible in any of the images; therefore, it is not present in the current scene for interaction.
- **Trash Can**: A grey rectangular trash can is on the wooden floor next to a countertop. It contains a single red tomato. It is a receptacle and is open (no lid visible). The tomato is inside it: `(inReceptacle tomato trash_can)`.

**Objects:**
- **Knife**: A metallic knife with a dark handle is on the countertop next to a pepper mill and near the stove. It is not held by any agent and is not currently in any receptacle. Its position is on the counter adjacent to the stove’s left side.
- **Pan**: A black frying pan with a silver handle is on the countertop. It is empty and not currently in any receptacle. It is located near a green cutting board and a black cup.
- **Potato**: A brown potato is visible on the countertop near a loaf of bread and a green vegetable (possibly lettuce or cabbage). It is not sliced, not cooked, not held, and not in any receptacle. It is on the counter surface.
- **Green Cutting Board**: A small green rectangular cutting board is on the countertop next to the pan and a black cup. It is not being used and is not a receptacle.
- **Black Cup**: A black cup is on the countertop near the fork and spoon. It is not a receptacle in the domain context.
- **Fork and Spoon**: A fork and a spoon are placed on the countertop near the black cup. They are not relevant to the domain types for this task.
- **Pepper Mill**: A metallic pepper mill is on the countertop near the knife and the stove. It is not a receptacle or relevant to the task.
- **Stove**: A black stove with two visible burners is on the right side of the countertop. It is not a receptacle and is not currently on.
- **Loaf of Bread**: A brown loaf of bread is on the countertop near the potato and green vegetable. It is not relevant to the task.
- **Green Vegetable**: A large green leafy vegetable (possibly lettuce or cabbage) is on the countertop. It is not relevant to the task.
- **Tomato**: A red tomato is inside the trash can on the floor. It is not relevant to the task.

**Spatial Relationships and Current States:**
- The knife is on the countertop, not held, and not in any receptacle.
- The pan is on the countertop, empty, and not in any receptacle.
- The potato is on the countertop, whole, uncooked, and not in any receptacle.
- The microwave is off and empty.
- The fridge is closed and empty (no visible contents).
- The trash can is open and contains the tomato.
- The agent is not currently at any object’s location; it must first navigate to an object to interact with it.

**Colors and Positions:**
- The countertop is brown marble with dark veining.
- The floor is light wood laminate.
- The trash can is grey and rectangular, located on the floor to the left of the stove.
- The microwave is silver and placed on the countertop, with its display showing "OFF".
- The fridge is black with a textured surface and is located against the wall.
- The knife is metallic with a dark handle, positioned vertically on the counter.
- The pan is black with a silver handle, lying flat on the counter.
- The potato is brown and oval-shaped, sitting on the counter near the bread.

```pddl
(define (problem put_task_problem)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        microwave1 - microwave
        fridge1 - fridge
        trash_can1 - receptacle
        knife1 - knife
        pan1 - object
        potato1 - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Receptacles and their properties
        (openable microwave1)
        (openable fridge1)
        ; Objects are initially not held and not in any receptacle
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (holds agent1 knife1))
        (not (holds agent1 pan1))
        (not (holds agent1 potato1))
        ; Initial locations: objects are on the countertop or in trash can
        (atLocation agent1 trash_can1) ; agent starts near trash can for simplicity
        (atLocation knife1 pan1) ; knife is on countertop near pan (assumed for task)
        (atLocation pan1 trash_can1) ; pan is on countertop (assumed near trash can for simplicity)
        (atLocation potato1 trash_can1) ; potato is on countertop (assumed near trash can for simplicity)
        ; Microwave and fridge are closed
        (not (opened microwave1))
        (not (opened fridge1))
        ; Potato is not cooked, not sliced
        (not (isHot potato1))
        (not (isSliced potato1))
        ; Pan is empty
        (not (inReceptacle knife1 pan1))
        (not (inReceptacle potato1 pan1))
        ; Trash can contains tomato (not relevant but for completeness)
        ; (inReceptacle tomato1 trash_can1) ; tomato not in domain objects, so omitted
    )
    (:goal (and
        ; Goal: pan with knife and slice of cooked potato in refrigerator
        (inReceptacle pan1 fridge1)
        (inReceptacle knife1 pan1)
        (inReceptacle potato1 pan1)
        (isSliced potato1)
        (isHot potato1)
        (opened fridge1) ; fridge must be opened to put pan inside
    ))
)
```

(define (problem put_task_problem)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        microwave1 - microwave
        fridge1 - fridge
        trash_can1 - receptacle
        knife1 - knife
        pan1 - object
        potato1 - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Receptacles and their properties
        (openable microwave1)
        (openable fridge1)
        ; Objects are initially not held and not in any receptacle
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (holds agent1 knife1))
        (not (holds agent1 pan1))
        (not (holds agent1 potato1))
        ; Initial locations: objects are on the countertop or in trash can
        (atLocation agent1 trash_can1) ; agent starts near trash can for simplicity
        (atLocation knife1 pan1) ; knife is on countertop near pan (assumed for task)
        (atLocation pan1 trash_can1) ; pan is on countertop (assumed near trash can for simplicity)
        (atLocation potato1 trash_can1) ; potato is on countertop (assumed near trash can for simplicity)
        ; Microwave and fridge are closed
        (not (opened microwave1))
        (not (opened fridge1))
        ; Potato is not cooked, not sliced
        (not (isHot potato1))
        (not (isSliced potato1))
        ; Pan is empty
        (not (inReceptacle knife1 pan1))
        (not (inReceptacle potato1 pan1))
        ; Trash can contains tomato (not relevant but for completeness)

You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

```pddl
        (atLocation pan1 trashcan1)   ; Pan is on countertop
        (atLocation potato1 trashcan1) ; Potato is on countertop
        (atLocation tomato1 trashcan1) ; Tomato is in trashcan

        ; Receptacle properties
        (openable microwave1)
        (openable fridge1)
        (opened trashcan1) ; Trashcan is open

        (not (isHot potato1))
```
